_comment: Test manifest for celebrity identification PoC validation (task 016). Add your test images to this directory and update this manifest with expected persons per image.

example_multiple_celebrities.jpg.notes: Replace with actual test image of two known public figures

example_no_people.jpg.notes: Replace with a landscape or object image

example_non_public_only.jpg.notes: Replace with an image of non-public individuals

example_mixed.jpg.notes: Replace with an image containing both a celebrity and non-public individuals
